headline: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
summary: Alexa Plus is receiving an AI update for advanced smart home control. It will connect with devices from Bosch, iRobot, Yale Home, and more. The update allows Alexa to route complex requests automatically.

headline: The Echo Show 21 is a great smart home hub that’s $80 off
summary: The Amazon Echo Show 21 is currently $80 off. It serves as a smart calendar, kitchen TV, and home hub with a large screen. Control smart lights, view recipes, and watch TV with this versatile device.

headline: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr’s war on the First Amendment
summary: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr is accused of suppressing free speech. He allegedly uses his power to threaten broadcasters for satirizing the president. Critics claim Carr's actions undermine First Amendment rights.

headline: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
summary: Claude's voice mode is now extended to Opus and Sonnet AI models. Previously, voice mode was exclusive to the faster Claude Haiku. The feature will also integrate with apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva.

headline: League of Legends Riftbound TCG: First Impressions of the Vendetta Booster Set | IGN Preview
summary: IGN offers a first look at the League of Legends Riftbound TCG. The preview focuses on the upcoming Vendetta expansion. Gamers can get early impressions of the new booster set.

headline: House of the Dragon Larys Strong Actor Matthew Needham Voices Joker in Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 | Comic Con 2026
summary: Matthew Needham will voice The Joker in Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2. Needham is known for his role as Larys Strong in House of the Dragon. The announcement was made at Comic Con 2026.

headline: Amazon Prime Has an Exclusive Batman Video Game Set to Launch Alongside Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2 | Comic Con 2026
summary: An exclusive Batman game, "Caped Crusader - Chronicles," is coming to Amazon Prime. It launches July 31st, coinciding with Batman: Caped Crusader Season 2. The game is a collaboration between Amazon and Warner Bros.

headline: Save Up to 48% Off VITURE's XR Glasses, Which Project a Room Filling Virtual Display for Movies and Games
summary: VITURE XR Glasses are up to 48% off, offering significant savings. These glasses project a virtual, room-filling display up to 175 inches. They are compatible with devices like Steam Deck, Switch 2, and Xbox Ally X.

headline: US imposes tariffs on dozens of trade partners over 'forced labour' imports
summary: The U.S. has imposed tariffs on approximately 60 trade partners. Tariffs are linked to claims of failure in stopping forced labor imports. The move targets countries not adequately addressing human rights in supply chains.

headline: Burnham pauses plan to release some prisoners early from September
summary: Prime Minister Burnham has paused early prisoner release plans. No prisoners will be freed until a comprehensive review is complete. The decision affects releases scheduled from September.

headline: Mum and daughter who died at beach were trying to save boy, 7
summary: A mother and daughter tragically died trying to save a 7-year-old boy. Shally Rahman and Samiha Rahman were pulled from the water. Emergency services confirm the rescue attempt led to their deaths.

headline: UK complacent about war threat, warns defence boss
summary: Europe's largest defence contractor boss warns UK is complacent about war. Dr. Charles Woodburn states the threat of attack is at an all-time high. The warning urges greater vigilance and preparedness from the UK.
